Hardware Component File

BSW_Standalone_X45

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference BSW_Standalone_X45_v1.0_20130118T082824.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 795
Receive ID 7B5
Functional Addr 6B
Functional Name BSW

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 1 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "4",
    "supplier": "4G3",
    "soft": "0400",
    "version": "0000"
  }
]

Associated Devices

ECU ID:
BSW front left sensor ID:

BSW front right sensor ID:
BSW activation switch button ID:
Sensor Supply problem ID:
BSW switch LED ID:
LED BSW left ID:
LED BSW right ID:
